    • Full scRNA-seq Workflow

Batch single-cell feature plots with shared color limits

GenerateFeatureMaps.Rd

Loops over features, generates a Seurat::FeaturePlot() split by split.by, applies a shared per-gene color gradient (0 → max expression), strips legends from individual panels, and attaches a single shared legend.

Usage

GenerateFeatureMaps(
  seurat_object,
  assay = "RNA",
  reduction = "umap",
  features,
  layout_method = "auto",
  split.by = NULL,
  row.by = NULL,
  colors = c("#053061", "#2166AC", "#D1E5F0", "#FDDBC7", "#F4A582", "#D6604D", "#B2182B",
    "#67001F"),
  output_dir = NULL,
  object_name = "",
  subset_name = "",
  order = TRUE,
  label = FALSE,
  label.by = NULL,
  label_colors = NULL,
  repel = FALSE,
  label.size = 2,
  pt.size = 0.001,
  add_boxplot = FALSE,
  plot_type = "violin",
  alpha = 0.7,
  ref_group = NULL,
  comparisons = NULL,
  group_colors = NULL,
  label_format = "p.signif",
  hide_ns = FALSE
)

PlotFeaturePlots(
  seurat_object,
  assay = "RNA",
  reduction = "umap",
  features,
  layout_method = "auto",
  split.by = NULL,
  row.by = NULL,
  colors = c("#053061", "#2166AC", "#D1E5F0", "#FDDBC7", "#F4A582", "#D6604D", "#B2182B",
    "#67001F"),
  output_dir = NULL,
  object_name = "",
  subset_name = "",
  order = TRUE,
  label = FALSE,
  label.by = NULL,
  label_colors = NULL,
  repel = FALSE,
  label.size = 2,
  pt.size = 0.001,
  add_boxplot = FALSE,
  plot_type = "violin",
  alpha = 0.7,
  ref_group = NULL,
  comparisons = NULL,
  group_colors = NULL,
  label_format = "p.signif",
  hide_ns = FALSE
)

Arguments

seurat_object

A Seurat object.

assay

Character. assay to use for expression values. Default "RNA".

reduction

Character. Dimensional reduction for the UMAP. Default "umap".

features

Character vector of gene names to plot.

layout_method

Character. "auto" (default) or "metadata". In "metadata" mode row.by must be specified.

split.by

Character. Metadata column to split UMAP panels by.

row.by

Character or NULL. In "metadata" layout, the metadata column whose levels define the rows of the grid.

colors

Character vector. Color gradient from low to high expression.

output_dir

Character or NULL. Directory to write PDFs. If NULL, the plot is returned instead of saved.

object_name

Character. Label appended to PDF filenames. Default "".

subset_name

Character. Second label appended to PDF filenames. Default "".

order

Logical. Plot higher-expression cells on top. Default TRUE.

label

Logical. Overlay cell-type / cluster labels on UMAP panels. Default FALSE.

label.by

Character. Metadata column to use for labels. If NULL (default) and label = TRUE, labels are drawn using Seurat::Idents(). Accepts any metadata column - avoids Seurat's ident-order problem and the error that occurs when a column is literally named "idents".

label_colors

Named character vector mapping each label value to a hex color (e.g. c("Excitatory" = "#E41A1C", "Inhibitory" = "#377EB8")). Labels not present in the vector default to "black". NULL = all black.

repel

Logical. Use ggrepel::geom_text_repel to avoid overlapping labels (default FALSE). If repel fails due to output-size constraints a message is printed and the panel is skipped rather than crashing.

label.size

Numeric. Label font size. Default 2.

pt.size

Numeric. Point size. Default 0.001.

add_boxplot

Logical. Append an expression violin/box plot column. Default FALSE. Requires split.by to be set.

plot_type

Character. Type of expression plot: "violin" (default), "box", or "both" (violin with a thin white box overlay).

alpha

Numeric. Fill transparency for violin and box geoms. Default 0.7.

ref_group

Character or NULL. If set, each group is compared only to this reference level. NULL (default) performs all pairwise tests.

comparisons

List of character vectors or NULL. Custom pairs to test, e.g. list(c("NCI","AD"), c("MCI","AD")). Overrides ref_group.

group_colors

Named character vector or NULL. Fill colors for each split.by level. NULL auto-assigns from Nour18.

label_format

Character. "p.signif" (default, shows */**/ns) or "p.format" (shows p = 0.023).

hide_ns

Logical. If TRUE, omit ns brackets entirely. Default FALSE (shows ns in gray).

Value

Invisibly returns the last assembled plot when output_dir = NULL; otherwise writes PDFs and returns NULL invisibly.

Details

When add_boxplot = TRUE a violin/box plot column is appended to the right of the UMAP grid. In "metadata" layout each row gets its own boxplot (cells from that row.by level only); in "auto" layout a single boxplot covers all cells. Pairwise Wilcoxon tests are computed with BH correction and displayed as brackets: significant comparisons in black, ns in gray.

When output_dir is provided the figure is saved as a PDF and nothing is returned. When output_dir = NULL the assembled plot is returned invisibly.

Functions

  • PlotFeaturePlots(): Preferred short alias.

On this page

Developed by Nourhan Abdelfattah.
